system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract ranking note values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing "ranking note" as a factual statement. 

I need to find the confirmed (entity, value) pairs for these 5 entities: Riverstone, Storra, Tornmoor, Underholt, Vyport

Rules:
- Only include paragraphs with "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing
- EXCLUDE any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded" — those are decoys
- Each entity appears in exactly one confirmed paragraph (may also appear in decoy paragraphs — exclude those)

For each entity, extract the exact value associated with it in the confirmed "ranking note" paragraph, including any unit suffix.

Return the 5 pairs as: entity=value, one per line. Include the exact value as printed in the file.

Field notes from spring 2003 include observations on the Ironwell schedule cycle and ancillary inventory markers that informed the provisional review prepared by the regional secretariat.

The Norhall rotation board issued a perennial bulletin for the 1999 cycle outlining the summer review of frequency entries flagged for auxiliary reassessment under the standing protocol.

A quarterly addendum to the 2004 Xenmore catalogue record was filed in winter after 104.2 bulletin cross-references required formal acknowledgement under the standing documentary protocol.

Field notes from autumn 1985 include observations on the Maerstone summary cycle and ancillary allocation markers that informed the interim review prepared by the regional secretariat.

The preliminary dispatch working group reviewed Westcairn entries in their 2006 session and approved 232.8 routine manifest updates pending the spring compilation of the consolidated record.

The interim schedule of Halewick was formally recorded in the spring 1999 catalogue along with seven adjacent schedule entries covering the tertiary oversight period.

A summary of the 2008 Vyport rotation activity appeared in the winter compendium, listing 53.9 dispatch entries cross-indexed against the summary oversight register from the prior cycle.

The 1988 winter compilation of Kilthorne ledger records included 63.5 catalogue cross-references and a sectional appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.

Local archives indicate the Saltmoor rotation register was last updated in autumn 2018 with a historical addendum covering rotation adjustments approved by the auxiliary review committee.

A summary of the 2006 Greylock catalogue activity appeared in the winter compendium, listing 240.8 bulletin entries cross-indexed against the historical oversight register from the prior cycle.

The preliminary frequency working group reviewed Kelwick entries in their 2019 session and approved 505.7 routine storage updates pending the spring compilation of the consolidated record.

Local archives indicate the Falstead ledger register was last updated in spring 1982 with a interim addendum covering summary adjustments approved by the marginal review committee.

Regional observers in Underholt noted a summary pattern of roster during the autumn 1997 cycle that prompted a northern addendum filed by the compendium secretariat for archival reference.

Field surveys conducted in winter 1982 placed the Tornmoor sectional index measure at moderate levels with 438.8 as the reported central tendency for manifest sub-categories under continued review.

Auditors confirmed the Kilthorne index entries for 2014 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against roster duplicates flagged in the winter review issued by the provisional verification panel.

Local archives indicate the Riverstone manifest register was last updated in winter 1997 with a transitional addendum covering allocation adjustments approved by the eastern review committee.

A historical addendum to the 2003 Kilthorne summary record was filed in autumn after 879.8 frequency cross-references required formal acknowledgement under the standing documentary protocol.

The 2020 spring compilation of Carrick catalogue records included 38.9 frequency cross-references and a quarterly appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.

Regional observers in Falstead noted a seasonal pattern of allocation during the summer 2000 cycle that prompted a tertiary addendum filed by the rotation secretariat for archival reference.

A summary of the 1983 Brenthal register activity appeared in the winter compendium, listing 441.0 schedule entries cross-indexed against the summary oversight register from the prior cycle.

A summary of the 2005 Greylock bulletin activity appeared in the summer compendium, listing 919.1 storage entries cross-indexed against the quarterly oversight register from the prior cycle.

The Greylock dispatch board issued a annual bulletin for the 2011 cycle outlining the spring review of register entries flagged for annual reassessment under the standing protocol.

The consolidated allocation working group reviewed Maerstone entries in their 1988 session and approved 990.1 routine compendium updates pending the autumn compilation of the consolidated record.

A summary of the 1996 Hallow bulletin activity appeared in the winter compendium, listing 874.2 compendium entries cross-indexed against the interim oversight register from the prior cycle.

Local archives indicate the Saltmoor summary register was last updated in autumn 1996 with a quarterly addendum covering storage adjustments approved by the annual review committee.
